title: Squirrel No Stuffing Dog Toy for Aggressive Chewers, Crinkle Squeaky Dog Toy with Rope KnotsLegs, Plush Dog Puppy Chew Toys for Teething, Durable Dog Rope Interactive Toy for Medium Large Breed
features: Fun Interactive Dog Toys: The no stuffing dog toys has strong rope legs, stuffless inside and two different sounds. The rope legs makes stronger than other dog chew toys, and can be used to interact with puppies, such as pulling, dragging and throwing. Not only enhance the relationship, but when the dog feels nervous distract attention by biting the rope toy to reduce anxiety. In a new environment, the dog rope toy also bring some comfort to puppies

Squeaky Dog Toys: There are 2 different sounds inside the dog enrichment toys, squeakers and crinkle paper, drawing puppies' curiosity. Make noise help dogs keep active thinking and avoid boredom. Crinkle dog toy can attract the attention of dogs, make them concentrate on playing and reduce damaging furniture behavior

Puppy Teething Toys: Dog toys for boredom with strong rope legs and special bubble fabrics can help puppies clean teeth effectively, and will protect gums and relieve discomfort. When puppy bite at the rope legs, the friction between the rope and the teeth can clean the dirt and plaque on the tooth surface. To a certain extent and keep the oral health, freshen breath. Proper chewing also generate saliva and help digestion of food

Cute Shapes Animal Toys: The various animal shapes are designed to meet a dog's natural instinct to chase prey, including monkey, tiger, hippo, squirrel and sloth, all with adorable smiling faces and vibrant colors. Each model comes in 2 sizes for all breeds. These interactive dog toys are perfect for tugging, biting and throwing, and provide an opportunity to enhance intimacy with your dogs

More Love for Dog: This puppy toys is an infallible gift choice, on Birthday, Christmas, Halloween, Children's Day, Valentine's Day or other Holidays. It will become a loyal companion as pets grow up and help them pass the lonely time, also offering companionship and energy consumption. If there are any problems with the product quality, please don't hesitate to contact us
